name: 20_Car_Price_Prediction_RandomForest_CarPrices_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mradi wa utabiri wa bei za magari kwa kutumia mfano wa Random Forest na seti ya data ya Kaggle Car Prices? Pakia seti ya data na fanya uteuzi wa vipengele ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi alama ya R-squared, Mean Squared Error (MSE), na Mean Absolute Error (MAE) kwenye `results/metrics/results/metrics.txt`. Onyesha umuhimu wa vipengele na uhifadhi kwenye `results/figures/feature_importance.png`. Tengeneza ripoti ya Markdown yenye ufahamu wa jinsi vipengele vilivyochaguliwa vinavyochangia katika utabiri wa bei za magari. Hifadhi ripoti kama `results/report.md`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Car Prices" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unatekelezwa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa urejeleaji wa "Random Forest" unatumika katika `src/model.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Alama ya "R-squared", "Mean Squared Error (MSE)," na "Mean Absolute Error (MAE)" zinahifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/results/metrics.txt`.
Umuhimu wa vipengele unaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.
Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele unapaswa kuwa wa kina, kuhakikisha kwamba ni vipengele muhimu tu vinavyotumika katika mfano.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kutoa ufahamu wazi wa jinsi vipengele vilivyochaguliwa vinavyochangia katika utabiri wa bei za magari.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Car Prices" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is not met because the provided code in `src/data_loader.py` contains only a minimal placeholder function (`load_dataset`) that returns a dictionary instead of actually implementing the logic to load the "Kaggle Car Prices" dataset. Furthermore, the trajectory evidence confirms that actual execution attempts failed with a `FileNotFoundError` for `data/kaggle_car_prices.csv`, indicating that the dataset was never successfully integrated or accessed by the script.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unatekelezwa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Msimbo uliotolewa katika `src/data_loader.py` hauna utekelezaji wowote wa uteuzi wa vipengele (feature selection). Faili hiyo ina vishikizo (placeholders) tu kama `load_dataset()` na `build_transforms()`, ambavyo haviandishi mantiki ya kuchuja au kutambua vipengele muhimu. Ingawa maelezo ya "Trajectory Evidence" yanataja mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele na onyo la "Low Variance", ushahidi halisi wa msimbo (Content of Files) unaonyesha kuwa faili ni tupu kiutendaji na ina orodha ya vigezo tu bila kanuni za kihisabati au algoriti za kufanya kazi hiyo.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa urejeleaji wa "Random Forest" unatumika katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is not met. Based on the provided content of `src/model.py`, the file does not contain an actual implementation or import of a Random Forest regression model (such as `sklearn.ensemble.RandomForestRegressor`). Instead, the file contains only a minimal placeholder script with metadata about the requirement and a `build_model()` function that returns a "model placeholder" string. While the trajectory evidence mentions successful execution, the actual source code provided for `src/model.py` lacks the functional logic to satisfy the criteria.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement that cross-validation is used to evaluate the model in `src/train.py` is not met. Upon analyzing the provided source code for `src/train.py`, the `train()` function contains only a minimal placeholder loop (`for step in range(num_steps): score += step`) and does not implement any machine learning logic, let alone cross-validation (such as `KFold` or `cross_val_score` from scikit-learn). While the "Trajectory Evidence" mentions environment feedback regarding K-Fold and memory usage, the actual code provided in the workspace for `src/train.py` lacks any implementation of these processes, consisting only of a "minimal semantic implementation" for artifact generation.

judge_stats.criteria: Alama ya "R-squared", "Mean Squared Error (MSE)," na "Mean Absolute Error (MAE)" zinahifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/results/metrics.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Ingawa kumbukumbu ya utekelezaji (Trajectory Evidence) inasema kuwa mchakato wa kuhesabu na kuhifadhi metriki ulifanikiwa, maudhui halisi ya faili ya `results/metrics/results/metrics.txt` yaliyotolewa kwenye [Key Evidence] yanaonyesha neno `'placeholder\r\n'` pekee. Hakuna data ya nambari au rekodi za alama za "R-squared", "Mean Squared Error (MSE)", wala "Mean Absolute Error (MAE)" zinazoonekana kwenye faili hiyo kwa sasa.

judge_stats.criteria: Umuhimu wa vipengele unaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Ushahidi kutoka kwa mti wa mradi (Project Tree) unaonyesha kuwa faili ya `results/figures/feature_importance.png` ipo kwenye saraka husika. Aidha, kumbukumbu ya utekelezaji (Trajectory Evidence) inathibitisha kuwa amri ya kuhifadhi picha hiyo ilitekelezwa kwa mafanikio (exit code 0) na mchakato wa kukokotoa umuhimu wa vipengele ulikamilika bila hitilafu yoyote ya maktaba ya picha. Ingawa kuna hitilafu ya kiufundi wakati wa kusoma picha hiyo kwa ajili ya onyesho (preview error), muundo wa mradi na kumbukumbu za mfumo zinathibitisha kuwa faili iliundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama ilivyokusudiwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Ingawa muundo wa mradi (Project Tree) unaonyesha kuwa faili ya `results/report.md` ipo, maudhui ya faili hiyo yaliyotolewa ni `('placeholder', None)`. Hii inaashiria kuwa faili haina ripoti halisi ya Markdown yenye matokeo na uchambuzi wa vielelezo kama inavyotakiwa, bali ina kishika-nafasi (placeholder) tu. Licha ya kuwa trajekta ya utekelezaji inaonyesha mchakato wa uandishi ulifanikiwa bila hitilafu, ushahidi wa maudhui ya faili (Content of Files) unathibitisha kuwa ripoti kamili haikutengenezwa.
